query:
SELECT id, original_name, row_count, col_count, created_at,
       JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(df_info, '$.fields')) as field_count
FROM sessions
WHERE original_name LIKE '%爱比爱尼%' OR original_name LIKE '%时皙%' OR original_name LIKE '%时暫%' OR original_name LIKE '%时哲%'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
